# Visa Fraud Protection

If your Visa card is lost or stolen, contact your issuing bank immediately to
report the fraud. Your bank can freeze the account, dispute the transactions,
and issue a replacement card. Visa Zero Liability protects cardholders from
unauthorized charges when reported promptly.
